payload.name: Fix generator data errors
payload.description: Update generator_data to expose name_list, description_list, creation_date_list and completion_date_list correctly.

payload.name: Refactor task_generator
payload.description: Remove custom __init__ from TaskGenerator and let @dataclass(frozen=True) handle it.

payload.name: Make --jsonl optional in CLI
payload.description: Adjust the Typer command so --jsonl is truly optional when using only stdin or generator.
